    • FAQs

      Questions you may have, answered with
      • What software features are unique to the Pixel 8 Pro?
        The Google Pixel 8 Pro runs on the latest Android version and often includes exclusive software features like Call Screen, Hold For Me, and Recorder with real-time transcriptions. These features leverage Google's AI technology to enhance user experience and productivity.
